changelog:
- Mine entire ore veins and connected blocks at once
- Zero lag: No particles, single sound, centralized drops
- Smart item stacking reduces entity count
- Sneak activation (configurable)
- Toggle keybind (V) to enable/disable on the fly
- Proper durability consumption per block
- Configurable hunger/exhaustion system
- Correct tool requirement (pickaxe for ores, axe for logs, etc.)
- Tool break protection (stops before tool breaks)
- Optional cooldown system
- Configurable block limit (default 64, max 1000)
- 26-direction search including diagonals
- Respects block metadata (won't mix wood types)
- 20+ configuration options
- Supports: All ores, logs, stone, dirt, gravel, sand, clay, netherrack, end stone, glowstone
- Works with Fortune and Silk Touch enchantments
- Compatible with modded tools (uses Forge tool classes)
